payload.rationale: The leader must have an entry from its current term to advance the commit index.
Whether the leader has an entry from its current term.

payload.label: current_term_commit
payload.rationale: The commit index is advanced only with entries from the current term.
A leader should not advance commit on quorum replicas alone when the highest committed entry is still from a previous term.
A leader should not advance commit on quorum replicas alone when the highest committed entry is still from a previous term.

payload.query: etcd raft current term commit invariant hidden state quorum current term

selection.rationale: Prefer the strictest reviewer that preserves false-accept control, recall, and runtime. Abstentions are tolerated when they do not reduce useful outcomes.
